name: @controluiclaw/sdk
description: TypeScript SDK for connecting to the OpenClaw gateway via WebSocket

scripts.@test.html:
npm run build && printf '
  Test page: http://127.0.0.1:8787/test.html

' && npx --yes serve . -l 8787
scripts.@test.html:watch: npm run build && concurrently -k -n tsc,web -c blue,magenta "nodemon -q -L -C --watch src --ext ts --exec npm run build" "live-server . --port=8787 --open=test.html"
scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for(const ext of ['.js','.js.map','.d.ts','.d.ts.map']){const s='dist/index'+ext,d='dist/controluiclaw'+ext; if(fs.existsSync(s)){fs.copyFileSync(s,d)}}"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build
